creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, please add it to the URL field.

Q/A:  /tmp/251996/audio/hydrogen/files/patch-data_i18n_CMakeLists.txt: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).
